title: crepidium macrochilum
intro: Crepidium macrochilum, also known as the 'Tiger Orchid', is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Central and South America. The plant is reported to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a natural diuretic and to have anti-inflammatory properties. Its health benefits include reducing swelling and alleviating symptoms of urinary tract infections, and it is also used to treat fever and rheumatism. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of Crepidium macrochilum involve boiling the roots and leaves to create a decoction for medicinal use, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
